pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + Fast Causal N-Gram Tilt & Subword Certainty— 1.1052 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Custom Triton/CUTLASS fused MLP kernels with precomputed act_grad, wider MLP, Hessian-guided mixed int5/int6 quant, fast n-gram tilt, Brotli.
techniques: Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward fusion storing act_grad
Hessian-trace driven int5/int6 allocation to fit wider MLP under 16MB
GPU-resident causal n-gram tilt with subword certainty overrides
